sentences.target: On est dans le département du Gers.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ n‿ɛ dɑ̃ lə depaʁtəmɑ̃ dy ʒɛʁs/

translations.fr: On est dans le département du Gers.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ n‿ɛ dɑ̃ lə depaʁtəmɑ̃ dy ʒɛʁs/
translations.en: We are in the Gers department.
translations.es: Estamos en el departamento del Gers.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đang ở tỉnh Gers.
translations.nl: We zijn in het departement Gers.
translations.ja: 私たちはジェール県にいます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (generic ‘one’, often colloquial ‘we’); 3rd person singular.
Copular auxiliary; present indicative 3rd person singular of ‘être’, linking the subject to a locative complement.
Simple preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘département’.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase denoting an administrative division.
Contracted preposition ‘de + le’ meaning ‘of the’; introduces a genitive/possessive complement.
Proper noun (name of the French department); object of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: Le département des ressources humaines gère ce dossier maintenant.
sentences.reading: /lə depaʁtəmɑ̃ dez ʁesuʁs ymɛn ʒɛʁ sə dosje mɛ̃tnɑ̃/

translations.fr: Le département des ressources humaines gère ce dossier maintenant.
translations.ipa: /lə depaʁtəmɑ̃ dez ʁesuʁs ymɛn ʒɛʁ sə dosje mɛ̃tnɑ̃/
translations.en: The human resources department is handling this file now.
translations.es: El departamento de recursos humanos se encarga de este expediente ahora.
translations.de: Die Personalabteilung bearbeitet diese Akte jetzt.
translations.it: L'ufficio del personale gestisce ora questo fascicolo.
translations.ko: 인사부가 지금 이 서류를 처리하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 人力资源部现在正在处理这个档案。
translations.yue: 人力資源部而家正處理呢份檔案。
translations.ru: Отдел кадров сейчас занимается этим делом.
translations.pt: O departamento de recursos humanos está tratando deste processo agora.
translations.he: מחלקת משאבי האנוש מטפלת עכשיו בתיק הזה.
translations.tr: İnsan kaynakları bölümü şimdi bu dosyayla ilgileniyor.
translations.vi: Bộ phận nhân sự hiện đang xử lý hồ sơ này.
translations.ar: قسم الموارد البشرية يتولى هذا الملف الآن.
translations.nl: De HR-afdeling behandelt dit dossier nu.
translations.uk: Відділ кадрів зараз опрацьовує цю справу.
translations.hu: A humánerőforrás-osztály most kezeli ezt az ügyet.
translations.hi: मानव संसाधन विभाग अब इस फ़ाइल को संभाल रहा है.
translations.pl: Dział kadr teraz zajmuje się tą sprawą.
translations.el: Το τμήμα ανθρώπινου δυναμικού χειρίζεται τώρα αυτόν τον φάκελο.
translations.id: Departemen SDM sedang menangani berkas ini sekarang.
translations.sv: HR-avdelningen hanterar det här ärendet nu.
translations.ro: Departamentul de resurse umane se ocupă acum de acest dosar.
translations.cs: Personální oddělení nyní vyřizuje tento spis.
translations.ja: 人事部が今この案件を担当しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘département’.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Contracted preposition ‘de + les’ meaning ‘of the’; introduces the complement noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the NP in the expression ‘ressources humaines’.
Adjective, feminine plural; modifies ‘ressources’.
Main verb; present indicative 3rd person singular of ‘gérer’; transitive verb taking a direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘dossier’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘gère’.
Adverb of time; modifies the clause to indicate present time.

sentences.target: Je dois contacter le département des admissions.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa kɔ̃takte lə depaʁtəmɑ̃ dez admisjɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je dois contacter le département des admissions.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa kɔ̃takte lə depaʁtəmɑ̃ dez admisjɔ̃/
translations.en: I need to contact the admissions department.
translations.es: Tengo que contactar con el departamento de admisiones.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要联系招生办公室。
translations.yue: 我需要聯絡招生辦公室。
translations.ru: Мне нужно связаться с приемной комиссией.
translations.pt: Preciso entrar em contato com o departamento de admissões.
translations.he: עליי ליצור קשר עם מחלקת הקבלה.
translations.tr: Kayıt kabul birimiyle iletişime geçmem gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Tôi cần liên hệ với phòng tuyển sinh.
translations.ar: أحتاج إلى التواصل مع قسم القبول.
translations.nl: Ik moet contact opnemen met de toelatingsafdeling.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно зв’язатися з приймальною комісією.
translations.hu: Fel kell vennem a kapcsolatot a felvételi irodával.
translations.hi: मुझे प्रवेश विभाग से संपर्क करना है.
translations.pl: Muszę skontaktować się z działem rekrutacji.
translations.el: Πρέπει να επικοινωνήσω με το τμήμα εισαγωγών.
translations.ro: Trebuie să contactez departamentul de admitere.
translations.ja: 入学課に連絡しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 1st person singular.
Main verb; present indicative 1st person singular of ‘devoir’, expressing obligation; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘devoir’, denoting the action to perform.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘département’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘contacter’.
Contracted preposition ‘de + les’ meaning ‘of the’; introduces a specifying complement.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of ‘des’ specifying which department.

sentences.target: Ils traversent tout le département à vélo.
sentences.reading: /il tʁavɛʁs tu lə depaʁtəmɑ̃ a velo/

translations.fr: Ils traversent tout le département à vélo.
translations.ipa: /il tʁavɛʁs tu lə depaʁtəmɑ̃ a velo/
translations.en: They are riding across the whole department by bike.
translations.es: Están recorriendo todo el departamento en bicicleta.
translations.de: Sie fahren mit dem Fahrrad durch das ganze Département.
translations.it: Stanno attraversando tutto il dipartimento in bicicletta.
translations.ko: 그들은 자전거로 그 데파르트망 전체를 가로질러 가고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正骑自行车穿越整个省。
translations.yue: 佢哋騎單車穿越成個省。
translations.ru: Они проезжают на велосипедах через весь департамент.
translations.pt: Eles estão atravessando todo o departamento de bicicleta.
translations.he: הם חוצים את כל המחוז באופניים.
translations.vi: Họ đang đạp xe xuyên suốt toàn bộ tỉnh.
translations.nl: Ze fietsen door het hele departement.
translations.uk: Вони їдуть на велосипедах через увесь департамент.
translations.hi: वे साइकिल से पूरे विभाग को पार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Διασχίζουν όλο το διαμέρισμα με ποδήλατα.
translations.nb: De sykler tvers over hele departementet.
translations.sv: De cyklar tvärs över hela departementet.
translations.ro: Ei traversează tot departamentul cu bicicleta.
translations.cs: Projíždějí na kole napříč celým departementem.
translations.da: De cykler tværs over hele departementet.
translations.ja: 彼らは自転車で県全体を横断している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 3rd person plural (masculine default).
Main verb; present indicative 3rd person plural of ‘traverser’; transitive.
Quantifying determiner used prenominally, meaning ‘the whole/entire’; intensifies the NP.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘département’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘traversent’.
Simple preposition introducing a manner/means phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘à’, indicating means of transport.
